attributes.action: Start focusing on women's health care. If men had pcos we would've had a cure.
attributes.additional_details: Women's healthcare is horrible. The medical neglect is crazy. We should work more on learning about womens bodies and finding cures for things such as PCOS which has a huge impact on a women's life. This neglect needs to stop. So manh women are impacted by things that men dont have to go through. We need to work on pain free medication. If men had periods or PCOS there would've been a cure and products would be free. If men could get pregnant, birth would be pain free. Sexism is all around us.
attributes.background: Work on improving women's health care and start actually caring about women instead of medically neglecting them and their bodies

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition which calls for a similar action: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757794
